mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or positive 20-day returns occur in fewer than 55% of rate-cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.0 percent, labor market slack suppresses wage growth and corporate profit margins, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 delivers positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of months where UNRATE exceeds 6.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate signals robust labor demand that expands consumer spending and equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 20-day returns in over 50% of observed instances or shows zero predictive power in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, a sustained decline in the industrial production index indicates capacity constraints and slowing output growth that depresses equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive in more than 55% of late-cycle periods when INDPRO declines for two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in real personal consumption expenditures reflect immediate consumer demand strength that translates into positive S&P 500 returns within the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of periods following a positive RSAFS revision or Rank IC stays below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index surpasses 235.0, inflation expectations force markets to price in tighter monetary policy, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 generates positive 20-day returns in over 60% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds the 235.0 threshold.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising real GDP and falling federal funds rates creates an accommodative growth environment that drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a negative coefficient in quarterly return regressions or positive returns occur in fewer than 45% of triggered quarters.

mechanism_narrative: In post-shock recovery regimes, a sharp rise in housing starts alongside stable employment indicates renewed economic momentum that generates positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 55% of post-shock periods when HOUST increases by over 5 percent.
